generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera providing RGB‑D data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraColorDepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor measuring current steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]

instance DepthCameraColorDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data streamed from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCameraColorDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB‑D data from Intel D435i depth camera"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraColorDepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data streamed from speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle steering angle data streamed from angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object positions derived from Hokuyo UST‑10LX point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARObjectTracksDataTransmitted
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Comprehensive ego vehicle state (speed, steering, pose)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesReportsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series reports of vehicle state and detected object tracks stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance AccDesiredSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired speed computed by ACC algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance SerializedMessagesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized ROS2 messages exchanged between twin entities"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance ACCAlgorithmModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control algorithm computing desired speed based on lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntimeEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering and tracking using DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANImplementationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterImplementationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware enabling intra‑entity communication over Wi‑Fi network"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:enables Visualization3DService
]

instance PythonRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime for rapid prototyping and ROS2 node lifecycle"
]

instance DBSCANImplementationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN implementation for point‑cloud clustering"
]

instance KalmanFilterImplementationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for tracking of detected objects"
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization and reporting of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringDashboardInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomaticReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC logic executed on the DT and speed command sent back to vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:provides SetDesiredSpeedAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACCAction
    DTDFVocab:provides TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance Visualization3DService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3‑D rendering of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboards showing real‑time vehicle state and detected object tracks"
]

instance AutomaticReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of reports from time‑series SQL database"
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set the desired speed for ACC logic on the DT"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnableDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control on the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking from remote controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Render 3‑D visualization of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance ElectronicSpeedControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic Speed Controller translating desired speed into motor voltage"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator controlling vehicle steering"
]

instance MotorVoltageCommandInterface : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Interface translating desired speed from DT into motor voltage command"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends desired speed commands back to the vehicle; the Actuation FE converts desired speed into motor voltage, which is transmitted over Wi‑Fi and applied to the Electronic Speed Controller, enabling remote ACC control and the UI issues enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and emergency braking commands."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with end‑to‑end latency ≤ 100 ms from vehicle to DT and clock synchronization accuracy of ≤ 100 ms, ensuring time‑synchronised data for ACC computation and actuation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation orchestrates sensors and actuators in the Physical Twin Entity, data collection, reporting, and ACC computation within the Digital Twin Entity, and user interaction via 3D Visualization and Control Panel in the User Entity, all coordinated by the Cross‑System Data Translation entity; ROS2 nodes communicate over Wi‑Fi with shared message topics."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the operated stage; it is developed and verified against R1‑R8 during a construction phase and deployed for real‑time operation and remote management of the 1/10‑scale vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real‑time fidelity maintained via 100 ms latency bound. Sensor data validation using filtering; ACC control validated against ISO 15622 specs. Model uncertainties addressed through filtering and emulation tests. Safety‑critical constraints require continuous integrity checks."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication uses ROS2 over a Wi‑Fi network for inter‑entity messaging; the Data Translation FE serializes data into message types, and sensor data is delivered via ROS2 topics; connectivity between PT and DT is wireless with typical 2.4 GHz Wi‑Fi links."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Components run on the vehicle’s NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for on‑board processing (Physical Twin and part of Digital Twin), off‑loaded ACC computation on an external server or cloud host, and UI on a user workstation; deployment follows containerised ROS2 packages."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Part 2 reference architecture is applied for the DT structure, ROS2 communication interfaces conform to standard middleware practices, NVIDIA Jetpack SDK follows NVIDIA standards, and communication interfaces are standardized per R1."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical remote operations necessitate coverage of communication latency, fail‑safe actuation, and adherence to ISO 15622 safety constraints. The design acknowledges the risk of remote execution causing accidents, requiring robust safety mechanisms; however explicit safety measures are not detailed."
]
